title: Applying AI to break trading’s three biggest walls
author: ResourceSuch5589
selftext:
I’m the co-founder of **Nvestiq**, and I wanted to share what we’re building and get feedback from this community of AI-focused traders.

Most traders eventually hit three walls: the **time** it takes to manually backtest, the **emotions** that lead to inconsistent decisions, and the **coding barrier** that stops most people from automating their strategies. Our goal is to break through those walls by combining conversational AI with institutional-grade simulation.

The workflow is straightforward. A trader describes their idea in plain English, our engine interprets abstract concepts like supply zones or liquidity grabs, and then runs high-fidelity backtests in seconds. Once validated, strategies can run in environments traders already use, including Pine, MQL5, and C#.

We capped our first beta at 100 users to stress test the approach. After two months of rebuilding based on feedback, we’re preparing to open **Beta 2 (free)**.

I know many here are already deep into building with AI in trading. I’d love feedback on two fronts: what validation methods you consider essential, and how you’d like to see risk management and reporting handled.

You can see more or sign up for the beta at [nvestiq.com](https://nvestiq.com?utm_source=chatgpt.com).
